vllm.title: fix bias in if, ambiguous
vllm.author: hliuca
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Bool value of Tensor with more than one value is ambiguous.

vllm.title: [Minor Fix] Use cupy-cuda11x in CUDA 11.8 build
vllm.author: chenxu2048
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The packages for CUDA 11.8 depend on cupy-cuda12x instead cupy-cuda11x (#3107). Here is a minor fix for it.
cupy-cuda12x == 12.1.0  # Required for CUDA graphs. CUDA 11.8 users should install cupy-cuda11x instead.

We don't know which version of cupy-cuda11x is required. Thus just let pip decides it.

vllm.title: Add missing kernel for CodeLlama-34B on A/H100 (no tensor parallelism) when using Multi-LoRA.
vllm.author: orsharir
vllm.bodyExcerpt: When loading CodeLlama-34B (or any of its variants) on a machine with sufficient GPU memory so that tensor parallelism can be set to 1 (e.g., A100 or H100), and while using Multi-LoRA, there's a missing punica kernel for the full size of the intermediate hidden dimension in the MLP layer (22016). Th

vllm.title: Add batched RoPE kernel
vllm.author: tterrysun
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Problem: Currently we need to call rotary embedding kernel for each LoRA request, which makes it very inefficient to serve multiple LoRAs with different context length.
Solution: Add batched rotary embedding kernel. Followup PRs will pipe it through.
Testing: Batched kernel tests. Followup PRs will

vllm.author: Yard1
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Lint is currently broken on master.

This is a simpler fix for the bug reported in #3343. Given that ray_compiled_dag is a experimental feature. Let's try to reduce its scope.

vllm.title: allow user to chose which vllm's merics to display in grafana
vllm.author: AllenDou
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
When two or more vllm instance were deployed in kubernetes, original grafana displays metrics from multiple vllm instances in a disorganized manner, Using model_name as a variable allow user to chose which vllm instance's metrics to display.
before

after
